get.description: get the user profile

Opens a **single persistent WebSocket connection** that supports
**chat messages**, **price negotiations**, and **booking creation**
between a **user** and a **merchant** for a property.

---
## Authentication
- Requires `access_token` (JWT / Paseto) as query parameter

---
## Connection URL
```text
ws://<host>/ws/conversation?access_token=<token>
```
---
## Message Envelope (Client → Server)
All outgoing messages MUST follow this envelope:
```json
{
"type": "<chat | negotiation>",
"payload": { ... }
}
```
---
## Emitted Events (Server → Client)
The backend emits **event-based messages**.
Frontend clients MUST listen to the following `type` values:
| Event | Description |
|------|------------|
| `chat.message` | New chat message |
| `negotiation.offer` | New negotiation offer |
| `negotiation.accepted` | Negotiation accepted |
| `booking.created` | Booking successfully created |
---
## 1️⃣ Chat Message (Request)
```json
{
"type": "chat",
"payload": {
"peer_id": "f41a39ea-a2f2-4fb7-bd29-0431cea44274",
"content": "hey merchant",
"property_id": "fef0dc60-9a9c-4c8b-bd6f-9f07e63e6844"
}
}
```
### Chat Event (Response)
```json
{
"type": "chat.message",
"payload": {
"id": "7267ccdb-29ea-4313-89be-f929c43671f1",
"conversation_id": "2665fc5c-3cb4-4d32-bdb2-358fab3c4a4e",
"sender_id": "0d861e3d-0f7d-4872-a637-f77eb5efa983",
"sender_type": "user",
"content": "hey merchant",
"updated_at": "2026-02-03T09:58:38.003767Z",
"created_at": "2026-02-03T09:58:38.003767Z",
"reply_to_message_id": null,
"property_id": "fef0dc60-9a9c-4c8b-bd6f-9f07e63e6844"
}
}

---
## 2️⃣ Negotiation Offer (Request)
```json
{
"type": "negotiation",
"payload": {
"peer_id": "f41a39ea-a2f2-4fb7-bd29-0431cea44274",
"amount": 450,
"property_id": "fef0dc60-9a9c-4c8b-bd6f-9f07e63e6844"
}
}
```
### Negotiation Offer Event
```json
{
"type": "negotiation.offer",
"payload": {
"id": "4479888f-ac9b-4884-a474-12415deee220",
"conversation_id": "6e7c4a89-af40-43d4-aa1c-beef96216905",
"sender_id": "f41a39ea-a2f2-4fb7-bd29-0431cea44274",
"sender_type": "merchant",
"amount": 450,
"is_accepted": false,
"updated_at": "2026-02-03T09:59:38.352822Z",
"created_at": "2026-02-03T09:59:38.352822Z",
"property_id": "fef0dc60-9a9c-4c8b-bd6f-9f07e63e6844",
"reply_to_message_id": null
}
}

---
## 3️⃣ Negotiation Acceptance (Create Booking)
When a **personal user** accepts a negotiation (`is_accepted = true`),
the system will automatically create a booking.
### Request
```json
{
"type": "negotiation",
"payload": {
"peer_id": "merchant-uuid",
"amount": 400,
"property_id": "property-uuid",
"is_accepted": true,
"check_in": "1770201307000",
"check_out": "1770287707000",
"number_of_people": 2
}
}
```
---
### Booking Created Event
```json
{
"type": "booking.created",
"payload": {
"CheckIn": 1770201307000,
"CheckOut": 1770287707000,
"NumberOfGuest": 2,
"Amount": 400,
"SubTotal": 400,
"Total": 430,
"Taxes": 30,
"Days": 1,
"PaymentHash": "KLUSTA_UE2d0FBwJMlJjgkJ4LdrdS4lMdS2pH9pL"
}
}
```
---
## Notes
- Only **personal users** can accept negotiations
- Booking is created **only when `is_accepted = true`**
- All events are broadcast to both user and merchant
- One WebSocket connection handles all message types
